text: Link-health states + consistency handling for external edges
description: Give cross-repo edges their own status vocabulary: resolved / repo-not-checked-out / repoId-mismatch / target-deleted. The consistency checker must SKIP external edges (no bidirectional back-reference exists by design — can't assume another repo needs you) and surface link-health instead of flagging 'non-existent child' errors. Surface link health in the UI.

status.comment: Parked 2026-06-27: repo-level-links-only pivot. The rich per-edge link-health vocabulary (target-deleted etc.) was for aim-level edges. Repo-only links need just resolved vs repo-not-checked-out, folded into the data-model + rendering aims (neutral stub when unresolved). Revive if richer states are needed.
